reviews.comment:
Espacio cubierto para pocos autos, más en épocas de verano, que se busca sombra en ruta
Baños muy de descuidados.

(Translated by Google)
Covered parking for a few cars, especially during the summer months when people seek shade on the road.
Bathrooms are very neglected.
